name: Rob's Veggie Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Black beans (or any other kind of beans you like - chickpeas work well too)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add onions and sauté until golden brown.
3. Stir in garlic and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
4. Add cumin and Cayenne (or to your taste).
5. Stir in the remaining spices you might like.
6. Cook for a few minutes until fragrant.
7. Add the peppers and sauté for another 3-4 minutes.
8. Transfer all ingredients into a crockpot.
9. Stir to combine well.
10. Cook on low heat for about 10 hours, stirring occasionally.
11. Serve with grated cheddar and cashew nuts, if desired.
Note: Adjust the amounts of crushed tomatoes, corn, and beans based on your crockpot size.
